title: carthamus × doumerguei
intro: Carthamus × doumerguei, also known as Safflower or Carthamus tinctorius × Carthamus lanatus, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the daisy family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects. The plant is rich in carthamine, a flavonoid compound that provides various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Carthamus × doumerguei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues.
